settings.text: Managed IT for ongoing support. Break-fix for when something goes wrong.

settings.title: Managed IT Services
settings.description: Ongoing support for a fixed monthly rate. We monitor your systems, manage your security, and handle your help desk so your team can focus on their actual jobs.

settings.title: Proactive Monitoring
settings.description: We watch your systems around the clock. Server health, disk space, failed logins, patch status — if something drifts, we catch it before it becomes a problem.

settings.title: Help Desk Support
settings.description: Unlimited remote support for your team during business hours. Password resets, software issues, printer problems, email trouble — one number to call for everything.

settings.title: Cybersecurity Management
settings.description: Firewall configuration, endpoint protection, email filtering, and quarterly security reviews. We keep your business protected without you having to think about it.

settings.title: Cloud and Backup
settings.description: Microsoft 365 administration, cloud backup management, and disaster recovery planning. Your data is always recoverable, your tools are always running.

settings.title: Break-Fix Services
settings.description: No contract required. Call us when something breaks and we will fix it. Most issues resolved same-day.

settings.title: Computer Repair
settings.description: Hardware diagnostics, component replacement, SSD upgrades, and OS reinstalls. We fix desktops, laptops, and workstations — most repairs completed same-day.

settings.title: Network Troubleshooting
settings.description: Slow Wi-Fi, dropped connections, switch failures, VPN issues. We diagnose and resolve network problems on-site so your team can get back to work.

settings.title: Data Recovery
settings.description: Deleted files, failed drives, corrupted backups. We recover what we can and set up systems to prevent it from happening again.

settings.title: New Office Setup
settings.description: Workstation deployment, network cabling, printer setup, and user onboarding. We get your new space running from day one.

settings.text: Call us and we will figure it out together. No jargon, no pressure.
